sector.name: Sector Name
sector.shade after 10.00 am_desc: Sun leaves this sector after 10 AM — great for hot summer mornings.
sector.shade after 15.00 pm_desc: Sun leaves after 3 PM — comfortable for afternoon sessions.
sector.shade befor noon_desc: In shadow until midday — ideal for early starts in summer.
sector.shade in the afternoon_desc: Shade arrives after noon — pleasant for post-lunch climbing.
sector.shade whole day_desc: Always in shadow — perfect choice on hot sunny days.
sector.sun the whole day_desc: Full sun from morning to evening — ideal for cold months.
sector.overhang_desc: Steeper than vertical — requires sustained power and endurance.
sector.slabby_desc: Less than vertical — relies on balance, friction and footwork.
sector.vertical_desc: Straight vertical wall — technique and balance focused.
sector.roof_desc: Horizontal or near-horizontal rock — requires strong lock-off and core.
sector.for_family: This sector is recommended for family climbing. It's safe for kids.
sector.for_kids: This sector is recommended for kids. Safe and possible for kids to climb.
sector.walking: Walking time from car parking to climbing sector
sector.authers_list: You can also see sport climbing route authors and their contacts
sector.no_reviews_available_boulder: No reviews available for boulder routes yet
sector.be_first_to_review_boulder: Be the first to review a boulder route!
sector.be_first_to_review_any: Be the first to review any route!
sector.be_first_to_review_sport: Be the first to review a sport route!

shop.name: Climbing Shop

meta.climbing_wall_description: Calculate climbing wall price. Get instant pricing for your climbing wall project.
meta.mein_page_description: Discover climbing gear, guided tours, and services at Climbing.ge – Georgia's premier outdoor sports marketplace.

wall.title: Climbing Wall Price Calculator
wall.subtitle: Configure your climbing wall and get an instant price estimate
wall.discipline_help: What do you want to climb?
wall.discipline_desc_bouldering: Short, low walls climbed without a rope — falls land on a crash pad below.
wall.discipline_desc_sport_climbing: Taller walls climbed on a belay rope, clipped through bolted anchors as you go.
wall.structure_desc_indoor: Mounted straight to an existing building wall or ceiling — no independent frame needed.
wall.structure_desc_outdoor: Weather-rated panels and hardware for a wall mounted outside, exposed to rain and sun.
wall.structure_desc_standfree_indoor: A fully self-supporting frame indoors — freestanding, no wall or ceiling attachment required.
wall.structure_desc_standfree_outdoor: A fully self-supporting outdoor tower — freestanding with weatherproof construction.
wall.sides_help: How many sides do you want to climb on?
wall.min_size_alert: The minimum wall size is {min}m — can't go any smaller.
wall.depth_limit_alert: Overhang depth is capped at {max}m for this wall — a deeper overhang would make the structure geometrically unrealistic.
wall.depth_hint: How far the top of the wall leans out past vertical. 0 = flat vertical wall.
wall.discipline_auto_switch_hint: Bouldering walls top out around 5m — we've switched the discipline to match the height you entered. Your other choices are unchanged.
wall.rope_instead_of_mat_hint: Sport climbing uses a belay rope, not a crash pad — no safety mat needed here
wall.no_mat_hint: Wall height is over 5m - no safety mat required for this installation
wall.holds_capacity_hint: This wall has room for {available} bolt holes on its real 21cm grid — pricing never exceeds that.
wall.export_pdf_error: Something went wrong generating the PDF. Please try again.
wall.help_text: Here are some tips to help you with your calculation:
wall.help_dimensions: Enter the wall height, width, and depth in meters
wall.help_mat: Safety mat dimensions are calculated automatically for walls under 5m height
wall.help_holds: Add climbing holds for an additional cost of $10 each

pdf.subtitle: Wall Construction & Pricing Export
pdf.standfree_note: This wall is fully self-supporting rather than attached to an existing building wall. Bracing shown in the side profile below is a :style, matching how far this wall actually overhangs. It sits on its own strip foundation footing, sized to :depthm deep (12% of the wall's own height) and priced at $300 per linear meter of wall width — see the Price Summary and detailed construction section below for the full breakdown.
pdf.brace_truss: braced support truss (vertical rear post + diagonal bracing)
pdf.outdoor_note: This wall is priced with a roof for weather cover, at $15 per m² of the wall's own footprint area — shown as the roof line above the wall's top edge in the side profile below.
pdf.footer_note: Prices, dimensions and material quantities are approximate estimates generated by the climbing.ge wall calculator, based on the exact configuration shown above. Final construction figures should be confirmed with a structural professional before building.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.missing_data: Your personal data is missing, which can cause problems. Check the "Options" page and add the missing information.
notifications.email_not_verified: We sent you a verification email — please check your inbox and confirm it. If you didn't receive it, you can request a new one. For a new message —
notifications.missing_image: Add a profile picture so people can recognize you more easily.
notifications.resend_success: A new verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
notifications.resend_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later, and contact support if this keeps happening.
notifications.all_good: You're all set — no notifications right now.

notification_settings.manage_notifications_hint: Manage your email notifications. Select the notifications you want to receive via email.
notification_settings.content_updates_section_label: Notify me when content I'm subscribed to is edited
notification_settings.confirm_enable_all: Are you sure you want to enable all notifications? This will send emails for all types of updates.
notification_settings.confirm_disable_all: Are you sure you want to disable all notifications? You will no longer receive email updates.

banned.reason: Your account was suspended due to a violation of our Terms of Service.
banned.blacklist: Your email address has been added to our blacklist. You cannot create a new account using this email address.
banned.no_appeal: This suspension cannot be reversed. Please do not attempt to contact support regarding this decision.
banned.email_banned: This email address is banned and cannot be used to create a new account.
